nasb.text: Now the chief priests and the whole Council kept trying to obtain false testimony against Jesus, so that they might put Him to death.

esv.text: Now the chief priests and the whole council  were seeking false testimony against Jesus that they might put him to death,

cnv.text: 祭司長和公議會全體都想找假證供來控告耶穌，好把他處死；

ccb.text: 祭司长和全公会的人正在寻找假证据来控告耶稣，好定祂死罪。

csbs.text: 当时，祭司长们和全议会的人为了要处死耶稣，都在寻找伪证来控告他。
